client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\(SSH_HOST, username=SSH_USER, password=SSH_PASS, timeout=30\)

def db\(sql\):
    with sftp.open\('/tmp/_q.sql','w'\) as f: f.write\(sql\)

Bash(/c/Python314/python.exe -c "
import paramiko, sys, io, time
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
SSH_HOST = '64.235.43.187'; SSH_USER = 'root'; SSH_PASS = '6BH07w0xB48?~kW-F'
client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\(SSH_HOST, username=SSH_USER, password=SSH_PASS, timeout=120\)

def run_live\(cmd, label\):
    print\(f'=== {label} ==='\)
    chan = client.get_transport\(\).open_session\(\)
    chan.exec_command\(cmd\)
    while True:
        if chan.recv_ready\(\):
            sys.stdout.write\(chan.recv\(4096\).decode\('utf-8','replace'\)\); sys.stdout.flush\(\)
        if chan.exit_status_ready\(\): break
        time.sleep\(0.5\)
    code = chan.recv_exit_status\(\)
    print\(f'Exit: {code}'\)
    return code

run_live\('cd /var/www/html/enterprise/api && npx nest build 2>&1', 'API Build'\)
client.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
